subject.name: TestimonialQuote
subject.purpose: A single pull-quote testimonial with author attribution; used in a testimonial section.

exemplars_say: It just works, and it stays out of my way.

behavior: Large serif pull-quote; author block below with optional avatar
Presentational only — no data fetching, no backend

accessibility.heading_hierarchy: no heading; quote is a blockquote with cite

instructions_for_external_tool: Generate ONLY the single component below as one file. Do NOT scaffold an app, backend, auth, or database. Component name: TestimonialQuote. Purpose: a single presentational pull-quote testimonial. You MUST use ONLY the design tokens provided in brand_context. Framework: react + shadcn + tailwind. Return code only. Single file. Accessibility: use a blockquote with cite; avatar requires alt text; 4.5:1 contrast. This is presentational — no Supabase, no data fetching.
